message:
feat(vdbe): FullScanSelect JIT template for hot full-table-scan SELECTs (bd-lezm3)

Second slice of PERF-W6-1 JIT: adds compiled template for Rewind/Next
loop SELECT patterns (SELECT cols FROM t). Pattern-matches Rewind+Next+
Column+ResultRow opcode sequences, iterates directly through the storage
cursor bypassing interpreter dispatch per row.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
